name: Freshservice
description: Monitor Freshservice IT agents and incident tickets for ITSM compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Freshservice Profile Settings (top-right avatar)
2. Copy your API Key
3. Encode: base64('your_api_key:X')
4. Enter the encoded value below along with your subdomain

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode your API key: base64('your_api_key:X'). Use https://www.base64encode.org/ — note the literal ':X' suffix

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Freshservice agents and their IT service access

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies Freshservice has a process for tracking and resolving incidents
